Accessibility checklist template

Component

  • Name:
  • Owner:
  • Version / PR:

Keyboard

  • [ ] All actions reachable by keyboard only
  • [ ] Focus order is logical
  • [ ] Escape / arrow / Enter / Space behavior documented if relevant

Semantics and ARIA

  • [ ] Native semantic element used where possible
  • [ ] ARIA roles/states/relationships validated
  • [ ] Name/description announced correctly

Visual accessibility

  • [ ] Visible focus ring
  • [ ] Contrast checked for text, borders and interactive states
  • [ ] Reduced motion respected

Testing

  • [ ] Unit/integration test added or updated
  • [ ] Visual regression touched if component appearance changed
  • [ ] Docs/examples updated
